final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand exposure mobile advertisement for OPPO Find X9.

Style/medium: needs a high-impact brand exposure aesthetic — references in the spirit of Apple product launch campaigns, Samsung Galaxy flagship teasers, OnePlus minimalist tech visual language; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 9:16 vertical format optimized for mobile full-screen display
Subject: must include OPPO Find X9 as the focal product
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a premium tech product atmosphere with visual impact priority — exact lighting approach is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "OPPO Find X9" (brand and model name)
Constraints: must be 1080×1920 pixels, brand exposure type with visual impact as priority
Avoid:
